## Checklist (per docs/AI-USAGE.md v1.2)

- [ ] AI self-review done against the policy hard rules; CI green (build, tests, lint, scans)
- [ ] `ai-assisted` label applied (if AI wrote a meaningful share)
- [ ] Tests added/updated and green locally
- [ ] Docs/ADR updated if behavior or a decision changed
- [ ] No FDOT content, no bulk NBI data, no out-of-Bicep Azure changes, no credentials/secrets (CLAUDE.md hard rules)
